title: DEADLINE ACTION ALERT: The Schall Law Firm Encourages Investors in RTX Corporation with Losses of $500,000 to Contact the Firm
text: LOS ANGELES, CA / ACCESSWIRE / August 31, 2023 / The Schall Law Firm, a national shareholder rights litigation firm, reminds investors of a class action lawsuit against RTX Corporation f/k/a Raytheon Technologies ("RTX" or "the Company") (NYSE:RTX) for violations of 10(b) and 20(a) of the Securities Exchange Act of 1934 and Rule 10b-5 promulgated thereunder by the U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission. Investors who purchased the Company's securities between February 8, 2021 and July 25, 2023, inclusive (the "Class Period"), are encouraged to contact the firm before October 2, 2023.

title: RTX space sensor to monitor coastal ecosystem health
text: GLIMR will fly aboard NASA satellite ARLINGTON, Va. , Aug. 14, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- Raytheon, an RTX (NYSE: RTX) business, announced today that its Geostationary Littoral Imaging and Monitoring Radiometer, or GLIMR, sensor has completed its Critical Design Review and is now in the build and test phase of the program.

title: RTX Provides Blue Canyon Satellites for NASA Swarm Test Launch
text: LAFAYETTE, Colo. , Aug. 14, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- RTX's (NYSE: RTX) small-satellite manufacturer and mission services provider Blue Canyon Technologies (BCT), announces successful launch and initial contact with CubeSats for the NASA Starling mission, a technology demonstration aimed at proving the success of cooperative groups of spacecraft operating in an autonomous, synchronous manner or "swarm.

title: RTX Corporation: A Bright Future To Unfold Despite The Engine Turmoil
text: RTX reported very strong second quarter results, but investors focused myopically on an issue found with the alloying of certain HPT disks in the PW1000G family of engines (geared turbofans). The article goes into detail about the issue, tracing it back to a 2020 incident that occurred on a Vietnam Airlines-operated Airbus A321 during take-off (0 casualties). It provides a repair cost estimate based on recent FAA directives and shows why the actual cost of disassembly/reassembly and replacing defective HPT disks is likely to be surprisingly low.

title: RTX awarded contract to develop platform agnostic, Beyond-Line-Of-Sight, satellite communications solution
text: New communications pod will work with commercial and military satellites in Low Earth Orbit, Medium Earth Orbit and Geostationary Orbit MCKINNEY, Texas , Aug. 9, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- Collins Aerospace, an RTX (NYSE: RTX) business, has been awarded a $36 million contract from the U.S. Air Force Research Laboratory to develop and demonstrate a platform-agnostic, Beyond-Line-Of-Sight, satellite communications pod. The communications pod will provide warfighters resilient, high bandwidth, low latency communications and data directly to the cockpit.

title: Why RTX Stock Stalled Out in July
text: RTX disclosed mid-month that its Pratt & Whitney unit has discovered a potential flaw that will require a costly removal and inspection of one of its engine models. The company slashed free-cash-flow guidance as a result.

title: RTX's Disappointing Update: Is Now a Golden Opportunity to Buy, or the Time to Bail Out?
text: Due to a manufacturing issue, the company will need to remove and inspect 200 engines initially, with 1,000 more anticipated to follow. The issue will hit free cash flow to the tune of $500 million in 2023 and potentially more in 2024.
